name: kazu-fira-monorepo
description: Framework-agnostic form recorder and replayer. Zero runtime dependencies.
author: ItsKazu

scripts.build: bun run --filter kazu-fira build && bun run --filter @itskazu/ext build
scripts.type-check: bun run --filter kazu-fira type-check && bun run --filter @itskazu/ext type-check
scripts.test: bun run --filter kazu-fira test && bun run --filter @itskazu/ext test
scripts.lint: bun run --filter kazu-fira lint && bun run --filter @itskazu/ext lint
scripts.lint:fix: bun run --filter kazu-fira lint:fix && bun run --filter @itskazu/ext lint:fix
scripts.format: bun run --filter kazu-fira format && bun run --filter @itskazu/ext format
scripts.release:version: bunx changeset version && bun run release:sync-versions
